docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PATEL, RAMESH AS TO DEFENDANT LAMAS, MARTHA C. DBA ALPHA RED'S COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-1997 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAMAS, MARTHA C. DBA ALPHA RED'S COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMESH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAMAS, MARTHA C. DBA ALPHA RED'S COMPANY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,040.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO MARTHA LAMAS, DBA ALPHA RED'S COMPANY RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
